createdFor: Crea un video explicando lo que son los harness de agentes de, ayudantes de codificación.

constraints.audience: People evaluating or building coding assistants
constraints.style: Clean technical motion graphic with diagrammatic SVG scenes

facts.value: A harness is not the language model; it is the runtime structure around an agent.
Agent harnesses organize controlled observe, decide, act, and verify cycles.
For coding assistants, the harness connects the agent to repository context, editing, terminal commands, tests, and review traces.
The harness sets boundaries such as sandboxing, tool permissions, reproducible prompts, logs, and evaluation gates.
Teams may use related words such as runtime, eval harness, agent framework, or orchestration layer; the shared idea is the controlled system that lets the agent operate.

risks: The word harness is used differently across teams, so the video defines the operational meaning instead of claiming a universal standard.
No Spanish SAPI voice is installed locally, so the deliverable is silent with Spanish on-screen explanation.
